$comment: Synthesised example: a TimeOrdinalReferenceSystem defining a local ordinal chronology — three ordered eras of a fictional regional geologic time scale.
name: Bolsa-Apache Local Ordinal Time Scale
description: An informal ordinal-only time scale for ordering events in the Apache Group and overlying Cambrian strata of southeastern Arizona.

referencePoint.name: Top of Pinal Schist
referencePoint.description: Boundary defined by the unconformity at the top of the Pinal Schist.
